title: AstroTracker fixture-set manifest
description: Contract for fixtures/{fits,xisf,raw}/manifest.json. Every fixture file has exactly one entry; `expected` is the parse contract the P1-01/P1-02/P1-03 parsers are acceptance-tested against.

set.description: Which fixture set this manifest describes.

file.description: Path of the fixture file relative to the fixtures/ package root, e.g. fits/nina/nina-light-mono-ha.fits

method.description: synthesized-to-conventions: authored in-repo byte-exactly to a program's publicly documented header conventions (cite docs in sources). user-captured: a real file captured by a user who granted a license. cc0-import: imported from an existing CC0 corpus.

program.description: Capture/processing program whose conventions the fixture follows (omit for pure format edge/malformed cases).

emulatesVersion.description: Program version whose documented conventions are emulated.

sources.description: Public documentation URLs the header conventions were derived from.

keywords.description: Typed values a conforming parser must extract. Covers at minimum every PRD 8.2 critical keyword physically present in the file. null means the parser must report the field as absent (e.g. OBJECT/FILTER for RAW).

cardCount.description: FITS only: number of 80-char cards including the END card.

headerBytes.description: Size in bytes of the header region (FITS: multiple of 2880; XISF: 16-byte signature header + XML).

errorCode.description: Closed enum of structured parse-error codes (DD-004: malformed input produces structured errors, never throws across a worker boundary, never aborts a batch).
